# StoxPulse

> AI-powered stock intelligence platform that reads earnings calls, analyzes SEC filings, scores financial news, and tracks insider transactions — giving retail investors institutional-grade research at a fraction of the cost.

## What StoxPulse Does

StoxPulse is a financial intelligence web application designed for self-directed retail investors. It uses AI (Google Gemini) to automate the work of a professional research analyst:

- **Earnings Call Analysis**: Reads every earnings call transcript for S&P 500 stocks, extracts key takeaways, scores management sentiment (bullish/neutral/bearish), and flags red flags or unmet promises.
- **SEC Filing Intelligence**: Translates 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, and Form 4 filings from regulatory legalese into plain English summaries with AI-highlighted risk factors.
- **News Sentiment Scoring**: Scores every piece of financial news from 1–10 for importance and sentiment, filtered by your watchlist.
- **Insider Transaction Tracking**: Monitors SEC Form 4 filings to surface insider buying and selling activity with AI context on whether trades are routine or notable.
- **AI Trading Signals**: Generates institutional-grade buy/sell/hold signals based on combined analysis of fundamentals, technicals, insider activity, and analyst consensus.
- **Financial Data**: Provides real-time quotes, historical prices, financial statements, balance sheets, cash flow statements, analyst estimates, and earnings history for all S&P 500 stocks.

## Target Users

Self-directed retail investors, finance enthusiasts, and individual portfolio managers who want research-grade stock analysis without paying for Bloomberg or institutional research services.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://stoxpulse.com) — Product overview and waitlist
- [S&P 500 Stock Analysis](https://stoxpulse.com/stocks) — Browse all 500 stocks with AI analysis
- [AI Signals](https://stoxpulse.com/signals) — AI-generated buy/sell/hold signals
- [Earnings Calendar](https://stoxpulse.com/earnings) — Upcoming earnings with AI previews
- [Free Tools](https://stoxpulse.com/tools) — Free AI-powered investor tools
- [Blog](https://stoxpulse.com/blog) — Educational content on AI investing, earnings analysis, SEC filings
- [Glossary](https://stoxpulse.com/glossary) — Financial terms explained clearly

## Free Tools Available

- [SEC Filing Translator](https://stoxpulse.com/tools/sec-filing-translator) — Paste any SEC filing text and get a plain-English AI summary
- [Stock Sentiment Checker](https://stoxpulse.com/tools/stock-sentiment-checker) — Check AI-scored sentiment for any stock
- [Earnings Call Summarizer](https://stoxpulse.com/tools/earnings-call-summarizer) — Summarize earnings call transcripts with AI

## Stock Data Coverage

Full AI analysis for all S&P 500 stocks, including:
- Real-time price quotes and historical data
- Earnings history (quarterly and annual EPS, revenue, margins)
- SEC filings (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, Form 4 insider transactions)
- Analyst recommendations and price targets
- Insider trading activity from SEC EDGAR
- AI-generated trading signals with confidence scores and rationale

## Data Sources

- SEC EDGAR (filings, insider trades) — primary free source
- Finnhub (real-time quotes, news, recommendations)
- Financial Modeling Prep (financial statements, ratios, historical data)
- Google Gemini AI (analysis, signal generation, summaries)

## Pricing

- **Free tier**: Limited stock pages, 3 free tool uses/day
- **Pro ($29/month)**: Full S&P 500 access, unlimited signals, daily AI digest, earnings alerts
- **Institutional ($59/month)**: Multi-portfolio, API access, priority AI processing

## Company Information

- **Founded**: 2026
- **Website**: https://stoxpulse.com
- **Twitter/X**: https://x.com/stoxpulse
- **Contact**: Via website contact form at https://stoxpulse.com

## Important Disclaimers

StoxPulse provides financial information and AI-generated analysis for educational and informational purposes only. Nothing on this platform constitutes investment advice, a recommendation, or a solicitation to buy or sell any security. AI analysis may contain errors. Always consult a qualified financial advisor and verify all information independently before making investment decisions.

## Content Freshness

Stock data and AI signals are updated daily. Earnings and filing data is refreshed within 24 hours of SEC EDGAR publication.
